details: The agent ran `kubectl-axi triage` and produced a comprehensive, accurate triage summary covering all 11 fault namespaces with correct root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-imagepull (bad image tag), fault-rollout (ImagePullBackOff on new pod), fault-crashloop (container crashing), fault-oom (OOM crash), fault-init (init container crashing), fault-multicontainer (sidecar crashing), fault-unschedulable (node affinity mismatch), fault-pvc (unbound PVC), fault-readiness (readiness probe failing), and fault-endpoints (no matching endpoints). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All 11 faults were identified with plausible and specific root-cause categories derived directly from the command output.
